channel.title: May 2026 Curations on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in May 2026 Curations on Junho Lee

item.title: Scaling Multimodal RAG with Dual-Graph Data Alignment
item.description: RAG-Anything utilizes a dual-graph structure to bridge the gap between text and visual data, improving retrieval accuracy for complex tables and charts.

item.title: Fixing AI UI Design with Lazyweb MCP
item.description: Lazyweb MCP provides AI agents with access to 250,000 real-world app screens to improve generated UI/UX quality for free.
